items.line_en: Good morning, how can I assist you today?

coach.say: Good morning, how can I assist you today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / how can I assist you today?

items.line_en: Good morning, I need to withdraw some money from my savings account.

coach.say: Good morning, I need to withdraw some money from my savings account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / I need to withdraw some money from my savings account.

items.line_en: Sure, can I please have your account number and identification?

coach.say: Sure, can I please have your account number and identification?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / can I please have your account number and identification?

items.line_en: Sure, here's my ID in my account number is 123,456,789.

coach.say: Sure, here's my ID in my account number is 123,456,789.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / here's my ID in my account number is 123,456,789.

items.line_en: Thank you, how much would you like to withdraw today?

coach.say: Thank you, how much would you like to withdraw today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / how much would you like to withdraw today?
Chunk it: I'd like to withdraw Rupa 500.

items.line_en: All right, do you have a withdrawal slip with you?

coach.say: All right, do you have a withdrawal slip with you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right, / do you have a withdrawal slip with you?

items.line_en: No, I don't, could your please provide me with one.

coach.say: No, I don't, could your please provide me with one.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / I don't, / could your please provide me with one.

items.line_en: Of course, here you go, please fill it out and sign it.

coach.say: Of course, here you go, please fill it out and sign it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Of course, / here you go, / please fill it out and sign it.

items.line_en: Thank you, the customer fills out the withdrawal slip and hands it over to the bank cashier.

coach.say: Thank you, the customer fills out the withdrawal slip and hands it over to the bank cashier.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / the customer fills out the withdrawal slip and hands it over to the bank cashier.

items.line_en: Thank you, I just need to check your balance to make sure you have enough funds in your account.

coach.say: Thank you, I just need to check your balance to make sure you have enough funds in your account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / I just need to check your balance to make sure you have enough funds in your account.

items.line_en: The bank cashier checks the customer's account balance on the computer.

coach.say: The bank cashier checks the customer's account balance on the computer.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The bank cashier checks the customer's account balance on the computer.

items.line_en: All right, your balance is sufficient.

coach.say: All right, your balance is sufficient.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right, / your balance is sufficient.

items.line_en: Is there anything else you need help, Wab?

coach.say: Is there anything else you need help, Wab?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Is there anything else you need help, / Wab?
Chunk it: No, / that's it, / thank you.

items.line_en: You're welcome, have a great day.

coach.say: You're welcome, have a great day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You're welcome, / have a great day.
